message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 通行证二维码

participant "巡查app" as App
participant "小程序或app或管理平台" as Platform
participant "lgm_community" as Community
participant "用户中心" as UserCenter
participant "lgm_auth_apps" as AuthApps
participant "lgm_certauth" as CertAuth

== 产生二维码 ==

Platform -> Community: 1 获取通行证二维码
Community -> Community: 2 根据用户找到实名信息，根据实名信息找到卡号
Community -> AuthApps: 3 获取二维码（实名信息，卡号）
AuthApps -->> Community: 4 返回（二维码）
Community -->> Platform: 5 返回

== 校验二维码 ==

App -> Community: 6 扫一扫
Community -> Community: 7 参考北京通二维码认证流程
Community -> CertAuth: 8 校验二维码（二维码）
CertAuth -->> Community: 9 校验结果
Community -> Community: 10 查询客户信息
Community -> Community: 11 查询登记信息，按照业主优先级排序后取一条
Community -->> App: 12 返回（登记信息）

@enduml
```
